headline: Netflix Buys InterPositive As Investors Weigh AI Impact On Margins
summary: Netflix (NasdaqGS:NFLX) has acquired AI content production startup InterPositive. The deal focuses on AI powered filmmaking tools aimed at speeding up and streamlining content creation. The acquisition is positioned to influence Netflix's content production costs and release cadence. Netflix operates a global streaming platform built around subscription based access to films, series, and original programming. Competition across streaming has intensified as media and tech companies fight for...
